title: Emerald Rails
description: A redstone-powered Emerald Rail for Fabric that boosts minecarts 15x faster than powered rails.
body:
**Emerald Rails** adds a new rail to **Minecraft**: the **Emerald Rail**.

It behaves like a Powered Rail (requires redstone power to activate), but when powered it provides **15× stronger acceleration** than a vanilla Powered Rail — **without changing Minecraft’s built-in minecart speed cap**. That means you’ll hit the vanilla cap faster, but you _won’t_ go faster than vanilla allows unless you use another mod to raise/remove that limit.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1449356/description_cb4e85f4-ed94-4348-ad3f-f7b181e01788.png)

### Features

Works like a Powered Rail: **powered by redstone signal.**
When powered, **15× acceleration** compared to vanilla Powered Rails.

### Crafting

for 1.21.6-1.21.11, to craft an emerald rail, the player needs 4 emeralds, 2 redstone dust and a breeze rod.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1449356/description_cec1d1f7-05fd-4c20-b743-2b72a969f70c.png)

for 1.20.1, to craft an emerald rail, the player needs 4 emeralds, 2 redstone dust, 2 prismarine crystals and a blaze rod, as breeze rods dont exist in that version.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1449356/description_7bc538a7-eb67-4cff-86d7-c06664e48bb7.png)

### Versions

play-tested between 1.21.6 - 1.21.11 fabric and works for any version between those two, also specifically play-tested on 1.20.1 fabric. please feel free to comment if you want a specific version, if you encounter an error or if you have a suggestion!

**NOTE:**

This mod **does not uncap minecart speed**. Vanilla minecarts have a hard speed limit, so Emerald Rails mainly helps you **reach top speed much faster**.

For high-speed minecart systems, a **speed/physics mod is strongly recommended and close to essential**, since it’s the thing that actually removes/raises the cap and lets Emerald Rails show its full effect.
